top_signals.title: Ecolab Set to Raise $5 Billion to Fund CoolIT Takeover
top_signals.summary: Ecolab Inc. has launched a $5 billion sale of investment-grade bonds to help finance its acquisition of CoolIT Systems Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Stablecoin supply tops $300 billion but growth stalls as Tether gains at rivals’ expense
top_signals.summary: The bank-issued and GENIUS Act-compliant stablecoin entrants have had a harder start than many expected.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
